{{Quote|Your cargo hovership will keep travelling back and forth to your allies' spaceport. On every return trip some nova crystals will be added to your stockpile.|Qui-Gon Jinn to Chewbacca|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''Corellian HoverFreighter''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] goods such as [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]] between [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|You can send multiple cargo hoverships on any given trade route.|Qui-Gon Jinn|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] HoverFreighters were manufactured at [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], costing 75 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] to assemble. As [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcrafts]] the HoverFreighters levitated above ground surfaces and could even traverse over bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]]. The HoverFreighters were [[Color/Legends|grey]] with painted strips on the side to indicate their affiliation. They had a rectangular shape with strips that extended below the body of the vehicles which carried orange boxes filled with [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].<ref name="GB" />

==Role==
{{Quote|As long as you protect your hoverships from harm, they'll give you a steady supply of nova crystals.|Qui-Gon Jinn|<ref name="GB" />}}
Corellian HoverFreighters were used to exchange goods between spaceports, typically carrying nova crystals on a return journey.<ref name="GB" />

==History==
{{Quote|Shoran has started sending his own hoverships to your market. Don't worry, they cost you nothing and it benefits your ally.|Qui-Gon Jinn to Chewbacca|<ref name="GB" />}}
Corellian HoverFreighters were used<ref name="GB" /> [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime colonial war]] between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]</ref> during the [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] for the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] fought between [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], acting as an advisor to the Wookiees, instructed the Wookiee [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to build Corellian HoverFreighters at his [[Chewbacca's camp|camp]] to faciliate trade between him and [[Shoran]], another Wookiee.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Select your spaceport and build a cargo hovership.|Qui-Gon Jinn's instruction to the player to build a Corellian HoverFreighter|<ref name="GB" />}}
The Corellian HoverFreighter was created for the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', serving as the Wookiee version of the cargo hovercraft unit.<ref name="GB" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
